main.background-image: linear-gradient( to top, var(--color--black-80)) 0%, var(--color--black-20)) 50%, transparent 100% )

main.filter: brightness(0) saturate(100%) invert(88%) sepia(21%) saturate(1009%) hue-rotate(345deg) brightness(85%) contrast(87%)

main.background-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color--charcoal-grey) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, var(--color--dark-background) 0%, var(--color--dark-background) 30%, var(--color--charcoal-grey) 50%, var(--color--dark-background) 100%)

radial-gradient(circle at center, var(--color--charcoal-grey-40)) 0%, transparent 70%), linear-gradient(180deg, var(--color--deep-black) 0%, var(--color--dark-background-20)) 10%, var(--color--dark-background) 30%, var(--color--dark-background) 70%, var(--color--dark-background-20)) 90%, var(--color--deep-black) 100% )

main.-webkit-mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black var(--mask-inner), transparent var(--mask-outer))
main.mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black var(--mask-inner), transparent var(--mask-outer))

main.background-image: linear-gradient(to right, var(--color--off-black) 0%, var(--color--off-black-90) 30%, var(--color--off-black-50) 60%, transparent 100%)
